flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at West Georgia Technical College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.1k → $3.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at West Georgia Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (30.1% vs 36.6%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at West Georgia Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at West Georgia Technical College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (50.6% → 57.8%).
